data.title: ACME Solar Expands Wind Power Project in Gujarat
data.description:
Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

ACME Solar Holdings Ltd. ( (IN:ACMESOLAR) ) has issued an announcement.

ACME Solar Holdings Limited has successfully commissioned an additional 16 MW of its 100 MW wind power project in Surendaranagar, Gujarat, bringing the operational capacity of the project to 44 MW. This development follows the first phase commissioning of 28 MW in October 2025. The project, financed by Power Finance Corporation and constructed using SANY’s 4 MW turbines, is part of a 25-year Power Purchase Agreement with Gujarat Urja Vikas Nigam Limited. The recent commissioning, ahead of the revised SCOD of March 5, 2026, underscores ACME Solar’s commitment to expanding its renewable energy footprint and enhancing its operational capacity.

More about ACME Solar Holdings Ltd.

ACME Solar Holdings Limited is a leading integrated renewable energy company with a diversified portfolio that includes solar, wind, storage, FDRE, and hybrid solutions. The company boasts an operational capacity of 2,934 MW and an under-construction capacity of 4,456 MW, including 13.5 GWh of BESS installation. ACME Solar is known for its in-house EPC and O&M divisions, which enable it to deliver projects efficiently while maintaining industry-leading CUF and operating margins.

Average Trading Volume: 118,576

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: 152.8B INR

data.title: Link REIT Reports Resilient Performance Amid Market Challenges
data.description:
Link Real Estate Investment Trust ( (LKREF) ) has released its Q2 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Link Real Estate Investment Trust presented to its investors.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Link Real Estate Investment Trust (Link REIT) is a prominent collective investment scheme in the real estate sector, primarily focused on retail, office, and car park assets across Hong Kong, Mainland China, and internationally. The company is known for its strategic asset management and diversification efforts, offering a resilient investment portfolio that spans multiple regions and asset types.

In its latest earnings report for the six months ended September 2025, Link REIT reported a slight decline in revenue to HK$7,023 million, a 1.8% decrease from the previous year. The net property income also saw a reduction of 3.4% due to negative rental reversions in Hong Kong and Mainland China, reflecting broader economic challenges. Despite these setbacks, the company maintained a strong occupancy rate across its retail and office portfolios, demonstrating resilience in a challenging market environment.

Key financial metrics highlighted in the report include a 5.6% decline in the total distributable amount to HK$3,283 million and a decrease in distribution per unit by 5.9%. The valuation of the investment property portfolio decreased by 1.4%, attributed to market rent adjustments in Hong Kong and Mainland China. However, the company benefited from a favorable interest rate environment, with net finance costs reduced by 7.3% year-on-year.

Looking ahead, Link REIT remains cautiously optimistic about the mid- to long-term outlook, despite expecting continued negative rental reversions in the short term. The company is focused on cost optimization and structural strengthening to navigate current challenges. Management remains confident in the core business fundamentals, supported by market stabilization signs, rising consumer confidence, and potential interest rate cuts in the US, which may lower funding costs in Hong Kong.

As Link REIT marks its 20th anniversary, it reflects on its track record of resilience and value creation, positioning itself to continue delivering long-term value to unitholders amid evolving market conditions.

data.description:
Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Nagase & Co ( (JP:8012) ) has provided an announcement.

Nagase & Co., Ltd. reported its consolidated financial results for the six months ended September 30, 2025, showing a slight decrease in net sales by 0.3% compared to the previous year. Despite this, gross profit increased by 3.3%, and ordinary income rose by 2.1%, although profit attributable to owners of the parent decreased by 5.6%. The company has made significant changes in its scope of consolidation, adding eight new companies and excluding one, which may impact its future operations and market positioning.

More about Nagase & Co

Nagase & Co., Ltd. is a company listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange’s Prime Market, primarily operating in the chemical industry. The company focuses on providing specialized chemical products and services, with a market presence that includes various subsidiaries and joint ventures across different regions.

data.title: West Wits Mining Advances Qala Shallows Project with Strong Financial Backing
data.description:
Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

West Wits Mining Limited ( (AU:WWI) ) has issued an update.

West Wits Mining Limited has had a transformative year, securing substantial funding and advancing its Qala Shallows Gold Project towards production. The company strengthened its financial position with a ZAR 875 million loan from South African banks and a US$12.5 million facility from Nebari, alongside successful equity raises. These efforts have enabled West Wits to increase its project ownership and simplify its structure. The updated Definitive Feasibility Study highlighted the project’s potential, with significant upside due to current gold prices. Bloomberg recognized Qala Shallows as South Africa’s first new underground gold mine in 15 years, emphasizing its strategic importance. The company aims to maintain its development schedule, targeting its first gold pour in March 2026 and a steady-state production rate by 2028.

More about West Wits Mining Limited

West Wits Mining Limited (ASX: WWI) (OTCQB: WMWWF) is engaged in the exploration, development, and production of high-value precious and base metals. The company operates primarily in the Witwatersrand Basin in South Africa, known for its significant gold reserves, and is also exploring gold and copper in Western Australia.

Average Trading Volume: 22,445,086

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$191.7M

data.title: Picard Medical, Inc. Reports Increased Revenue Amidst Financial Challenges
data.description:
Picard Medical, Inc. ( (PMI) ) has released its Q3 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Picard Medical, Inc. presented to its investors.

TipRanks Black Friday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

Picard Medical, Inc. is a Delaware-based company specializing in the design, manufacture, and sale of medical devices, notably the SynCardia total artificial heart, which serves patients with advanced heart failure. The company operates primarily in the medical device industry and has a unique focus on artificial heart technology.

In its latest earnings report for the quarter ending September 30, 2025, Picard Medical, Inc. highlighted a significant increase in revenues, driven by product sales and rental income, despite facing a substantial net loss. The company continues to invest in research and development and has undergone significant financial restructuring, including a recent IPO and conversion of debt to equity.

Key financial metrics from the report indicate that Picard Medical, Inc. achieved total revenues of $1.187 million for the quarter, up from $881,000 in the same period last year. However, the company reported a net loss of $10.426 million, a significant increase from the $6.206 million loss in the previous year. Operating expenses remained high, with research and development costs totaling $951,000 and selling, general, and administrative expenses reaching $2.406 million.

The company has made strategic moves to improve its financial position, including the issuance of common stock and the conversion of convertible notes, which have bolstered its additional paid-in capital to $80.283 million. Despite these efforts, the company faces ongoing challenges with liquidity and has expressed the need for further financing to continue operations and growth.

Looking ahead, Picard Medical, Inc. remains focused on its strategic business plan and aims to achieve profitability through continued innovation and market expansion. The management acknowledges the need for additional capital and is exploring various financing options to support its operations and future growth initiatives.

data.title: Nano Dimension Reports Q3 2025 Financial Results
data.description:
Nano Dimension Ltd ( (NNDM) ) has released its Q3 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Nano Dimension Ltd presented to its investors.

TipRanks Black Friday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

Nano Dimension Ltd., a prominent player in digital manufacturing solutions, caters to industries such as defense, aerospace, automotive, electronics, and medical devices with its advanced technologies. The company recently released its financial results for the third quarter of 2025, highlighting significant revenue growth and strategic initiatives.

In the third quarter of 2025, Nano Dimension reported a revenue of $26.9 million, marking an 81% increase compared to the previous year. This growth was largely driven by the acquisition of Markforged. However, the company faced challenges with a decreased gross margin and an increased net loss from continuing operations, which rose to $29.5 million from $9.9 million year-over-year. Despite these challenges, the company maintained a strong cash position with $515.5 million in cash and equivalents.

Key strategic moves included the acceleration of cost reduction initiatives, expected to result in significant savings by early 2026. The company also executed substantial share repurchases, acquiring over 10 million shares, and appointed John Brenton as the new Chief Financial Officer to further drive financial discipline. Additionally, Nano Dimension issued financial guidance for the fourth quarter of 2025, projecting revenue between $31.5 million and $33.5 million.

Looking forward, Nano Dimension remains committed to enhancing its operational efficiency and expanding its customer base. The company is actively reviewing strategic alternatives to maximize shareholder value and unlock the potential of its technology and operations. With a focus on improving operations and customer relationships, Nano Dimension aims to sustain its growth trajectory and strengthen its market position.
